summary: Bank Statement PDF Import feature fully tested - all backend endpoints (15 tests) and frontend UI flows working correctly. PDF parsing extracts 86 transactions with 14 groups, import confirmation saves transactions to database.

issues: Groups section could benefit from visual distinction between income/expense groups

passed_tests: Backend: Login with admin/220066mm returns 200 with token
Backend: POST /api/bank-import/parse with PDF file returns 200
Backend: Parse returns correct transaction count (86 for test PDF)
Backend: Parse returns correct currency (PLN)
Backend: Parse returns account number from statement (36 1020 1169 0000 8502 0848 7755)
Backend: Parse returns groups of similar transactions (14 groups)
Backend: Parse returns transaction structure with all required fields (date, operation_type, description, amount, type, currency)
Backend: Parse rejects non-PDF files with 400
Backend: Parse requires authentication (returns 403 without token)
Backend: POST /api/bank-import/confirm requires account_id
Backend: POST /api/bank-import/confirm requires direction_id
Backend: POST /api/bank-import/confirm requires non-empty transactions
Backend: POST /api/bank-import/confirm imports transactions successfully
Backend: POST /api/bank-import/confirm returns account_name in response
Backend: POST /api/bank-import/confirm requires authentication
Backend: Full import flow (parse -> select -> confirm) works end-to-end
Frontend: Navigate to /import page works
Frontend: 'Импорт PDF выписки' button [data-testid='open-pdf-import-btn'] opens BankImportModal
Frontend: Modal step 1 shows file upload area [data-testid='pdf-upload-area']
Frontend: Modal step 1 shows account selector [data-testid='import-account-select']
Frontend: Modal step 1 shows direction selector [data-testid='import-direction-select']
Frontend: Uploading PDF transitions to step 2 (review)
Frontend: Step 2 shows summary badges (account number, income, expenses, selected count)
Frontend: Groups section [data-testid='toggle-groups-btn'] is collapsible
Frontend: Groups show label, count, total amount, and 'Назначить' button
Frontend: Transactions table shows all parsed transactions with checkboxes
Frontend: Each transaction shows date, type badge (Приход/Расход), counterparty, description, amount
Frontend: Select-all checkbox [data-testid='select-all-checkbox'] works
Frontend: Individual checkboxes toggle selection
Frontend: Clicking pencil icon on a transaction opens inline editing
Frontend: Edit mode shows input fields for counterparty and description
Frontend: Edit mode shows direction and category dropdowns
Frontend: Edit mode has save (checkmark) and cancel (X) buttons
Frontend: 'Назад' button [data-testid='back-to-upload'] returns to step 1
Frontend: 'Импортировать N операций' button [data-testid='confirm-import-btn'] triggers import
Frontend: After import, success toast 'Операции импортированы!' appears
Frontend: After import, modal closes automatically
Frontend: Imported transactions appear in the system (verified via API)
critical_code_review_comments: BankImportModal.jsx uses proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
PDF parsing correctly handles PKO BP statement format with Polish number formatting
Transaction grouping logic identifies common patterns (TikTok Ads, Google Ads, etc.)
Duplicate detection works by comparing date+amount combinations

test_credentials.note: Login field is named 'email' in API but accepts 'admin' as username

seed_data_creation: Imported 78+ transactions from test PDF (/tmp/test_statement.pdf) for July 2025
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bank Statement PDF Import feature fully working. Backend endpoints /api/bank-import/parse and /api/bank-import/confirm both pass all tests. Frontend BankImportModal works with file upload, transaction review, inline editing, group batch editing, and import confirmation. Test PDF at /tmp/test_statement.pdf contains 86 PKO BP PLN transactions from July 2025. Pencil edit button uses opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 - need to hover the row first to see it.
